WITH MinConsumptionPerSegment AS (
  SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    MIN(y.Consumption) AS MinConsumption
  FROM 
    customers c
  JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
),
AnnualAveragePerSegment AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(MinConsumption) AS AnnualAverage
  FROM 
    MinConsumptionPerSegment

    Segment
)
